name: Good Soul's Last Vision
description:
Thus walking by where no life dwells, echoes of the damned consumes the deep
of your soul, this is known as the last vision of good mortals.  By entering
the room, the cold, humid air shivers your bones, as you keep aproaching a
strange humming pool, made of bones, your will to live drowns in vain emotions
of remote dead ends.  The lifeless cave walls are adorned with human body
parts, which seem quite apropriated on the composition of the room.
